---
mode: agent
description: Generate a user story backlog item from a description or requirement
---

# Generate User Story Backlog Item

Generate a well-structured user story issue for the backlog based on the following input.

## Instructions

1. Read the provided description or requirement.
2. Create a GitHub user story issue following the story issue template.
3. Write the story in the format: "As a [user], I want to [action], so that [goal]."
4. Include concrete, testable acceptance criteria using Given/When/Then format.
5. Use the label `story`.

## Input

${input}
